chain.thought: Explanation: We look for a case where a successor had already managed the team before the predecessor’s tenure began. Chuck Tanner managed in 1969–1970. The next manager after him in 1971 was Bill Adair, who had previously managed in 1968—before Tanner’s tenure. Therefore, Bill Adair fits the condition.
